title: ResiliencyGap
description: A resiliency gap an LLM pointer-generator (Tier B) proposed and the engine re-grounded with the shared signature library (HYBRID-PLAN §7.9). Refutation-probe gaps are sourceTier=llm/needs-review. A confirmation-probe gap the engine re-derived deterministically at the pointer graduates to sourceTier=ast and may reach verified (§9.4).

checked.description: Paths the engine searched for a refuting signature before asserting the absence (honest negative).
